movies.overview: Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War. Throughout his voyage, he is forced to confront the whims of gods, mythological monsters, and trials that stretch both his cunning and his humanity to the breaking point.
movies.title: The Odyssey

movies.overview: A cybersecurity expert becomes a whistleblower after uncovering secrets about aliens, putting him on the run from a corporation. Meanwhile, a meteorologist experiencing strange phenomena joins forces with him to prove there's life beyond our understanding.
movies.title: Disclosure Day

movies.overview: Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people.
movies.tagline: The ocean chose her for a reason.
movies.title: Moana

movies.overview: After breaking the mysterious "One Wish Willow" to win his crush's heart, a hopeless romantic finds himself getting exactly what he asked for but soon discovers that some desires come at a dark, sinister price.
movies.tagline: Be careful who you wish for…
movies.title: Obsession

movies.overview: A strange doorway appears in the basement of a furniture showroom.
movies.title: Backrooms

movies.overview: When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.
movies.title: Supergirl

movies.overview: This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created.
movies.title: Minions & Monsters

movies.overview: Twenty-six years after outrunning a suspiciously familiar masked killer, the Core Four are back in the killer's crosshairs and no horror movie IP is safe.
movies.title: Scary Movie

movies.overview: When Bonnie receives a Lilypad tablet as a gift and becomes obsessed, Buzz, Woody, Jessie and the rest of the gang's jobs become exponentially harder when they have to go head to head with the all-new threat to playtime.
movies.title: Toy Story 5

movies.overview: Now that the Queen of Hearts is nice and Cinderella is safe, things seem perfect for Red and Chloe… But little do they know that changing the past created a new villain — Maddox Hatter. When Maddox captures the Queen of Hearts, Red and Chloe must work alongside Red’s new sister Pink, Luisa Madrigal’s son Luis, and Maddox’s son Max to save her and Wonderland.
movies.title: Descendants: Wicked Wonderland

movies.overview: Convinced they are our secret saviors, rogue U.S. operatives abduct Mexican gang members and seed them across major American cities, unleashing criminal chaos, swaying voters by playing on nativist prejudices, and forcing law enforcement into a race to expose the plot as the escalating carnage threatens democracy itself.
movies.title: Borderline

movies.overview: After a young couple witnesses a gruesome highway accident, they soon realize they did not leave the crash scene alone, as a demonic presence called the Passenger that won't stop until it claims them both turns their van life adventure into a nightmare.
movies.tagline: 130 million people take road trips every year. 15,400 of them are never seen again.
movies.title: Passenger

movies.overview: After a criminal network kidnaps Wang Wei's daughter and the corrupt police refuse to assist him, Wei sets out on his own to locate her. Navin, a tenacious journalist whose wife has mysteriously vanished, is his only ally. In this explosive martial arts showdown, the unlikely duo fights the kidnappers ruthlessly driven by a furious vengeance.
movies.tagline: To save their loved ones, they will fight everyone.
movies.title: The Furious

movies.overview: Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn't remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter Parker he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
movies.tagline: The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.
movies.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day

movies.overview: A group of international passengers on a flight from Los Angeles to Shanghai is forced to make an emergency landing in shark-infested waters. The terrified group is forced to work together and overcome their differences if they hope to escape their sinking plane and the frenzy of sharks drawn to the wreckage.
movies.tagline: Surviving the crash is just the beginning.
movies.title: Deep Water

movies.overview: A marine biologist is doing research on a fish farm when she encounters several strange occurrences. Along with the brutal deaths of two teenagers, all signs point to the deep fjord; can there be more to the depths than the eye can see?
movies.tagline: Only 5% of the ocean has been explored for a reason…
movies.title: Kraken

movies.overview: A man takes justice into his own hands, hunting down criminals. His vigilante crusade makes him a social media star but puts him at odds with the local police chief.
movies.tagline: An action film inspired by real events.
movies.title: Citizen Vigilante

movies.overview: A routine domestic flight turns into the flight from hell through a series of inexplicable phenomena and raw terror. Surreal encounters blur the boundaries between reality and nightmare. Passengers fight against all the odds in an attempt to survive while combating bizarre technological malfunctions, accelerating supernatural events and alien influences.
movies.title: Black Box

movies.overview: A ragtag group barricade themselves in an old Pennsylvania farmhouse to remain safe from a horde of flesh-eating ghouls ravaging the Northeast.
movies.title: Night of the Living Dead

belongs_to_collection.name: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender Collection

movies.overview: Avatar Aang, the world's last Airbender, learns of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction. With the help of his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls into the wrong hands and threatens to upend the peace they sacrificed everything to achieve.
movies.title: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender

last_episode_to_air.name: Episode 8
last_episode_to_air.overview: Manager Kim is captured and tortured — until the Special Missions Directorate steps in with a final mission. Ju Gang-chan makes a plan to get revenge.

tv_shows.name: Agent Kim Reactivated
tv_shows.overview: When an unassuming dad's daughter goes missing, he dusts off his old black-ops skills to track her down — only to attract the wrong kind of attention.

last_episode_to_air.name: Read the Room
last_episode_to_air.overview: Lucky tries to track down Cary—and her money. Agent Rand investigates Lucky's moves.

tv_shows.name: Lucky

next_episode_to_air.name: Too Close to See It
next_episode_to_air.overview: As Lucky confronts betrayal, old grudges take a back seat to a deadly chase.

tv_shows.overview: When a multi-million-dollar heist goes sideways, con artist Lucky is forced to go on the run. Pursued by both the FBI and a ruthless crime boss, Lucky must fight for her life—and a way out.

tv_shows.name: Jeopardy!
tv_shows.overview: America's favorite quiz show where contestants are presented with general knowledge clues in the form of answers, and must phrase their responses in question form.

last_episode_to_air.name: Off to Work, Yaho
last_episode_to_air.overview: This week's race determines the opening time for next week's episode. Already facing an extremely early call time, the cast must complete missions to delay the start as much as possible. With sleep and pride on the line, they fight to avoid another sunrise shoot! But the production crew has a tempting trick up its sleeve, luring the members to sacrifice precious time for valuable rewards. How early will they have to wake up next week?

tv_shows.name: Running Man
tv_shows.overview:
These days, as variety shows are gradually disappearing, this is one of Korea’s representative variety shows that has been responsible for Sunday evenings for over 10 years. This program features numerous stars and members going around various places, playing games, and completing missions. In particular, among the many fun elements of variety shows, this one focuses solely on laughter.

Open your eyes! Big fun is coming in!

Open your mouth! Big laughter is coming in!

Open your heart! Useful lessons are coming in!

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview:
Unpredictable big laugh that no one ever imagined!! 

How many landmarks do you know representing Korea? 

Korea's representative landmark that Running Man teaches with his body! 

 Korea's top celebrities gathered there! You have to solve the missions everywhere and get out of there by the next morning through the game!! 

Through constant running and tense confrontation, the hidden back of Korean landmarks will be revealed!
